title: heterotheca arizonica
intro: Heterotheca arizonica, also known as Arizona fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Heterotheca arizonica can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to address these health concerns.
